guest.description: Unauthenticated public visitors browsing the website.
permissions: Read-only access to public brand and shop catalog pages.
Submit guest Sizing Wizard inputs (cached in local session state).
Perform checkout and order payment using Guest details.
Read-only access to public brand and shop catalog pages.
Full CRUD access to own anatomical profiles and scan files.
Read access to own order history and live WebSocket progress.
Perform checkout, save shipping addresses, and trigger quick reorders.

partner.description: Verified institutional coaching academy or shooting club buyer.
permissions: Read bulk-order team trackers and configure aggregate item sizes.
Verify partner discount allocations in pricing scripts.

admin.description: Internal staff, custom grip builders, and system engineers.
permissions: Full read/write access to the Order Verification Board (status transitions).
Full CRUD access to catalog products and inventory counts.
Read/Write access to B2B Partner Application reviews (verify/reject).
Read-only access to the Audit Log database ledger.

security_requirements.auth_tokens: JWT HS256 access tokens (15m expiry) + HTTP-only cookies refresh tokens (7d expiry).
security_requirements.two_factor_auth: TOTP 2FA required for Admin console access.
security_requirements.bola_protection: Strict route validation: `user_id` inside JWT must match resource target `user_id` (block access if mismatch).
security_requirements.file_security: MIME-type check to restrict FileUploadZone to images (JPEG, PNG, PDF scans), rejecting binaries or executables.
